name: Macaroons-tv Food Network
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees.
2. Combine the finely ground almonds, sugar, and almond extract in a bowl.
3. Add the beaten egg whites and mix until all ingredients are thoroughly combined.
4. Line a cookie sheet with parchment paper.
5. Using a pastry bag, pipe small, thick drops of batter onto the prepared cookie sheet, spacing them about 2 inches apart.
6. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes or until set.
7. Allow to cool.
Yield: About 2 dozen macaroons (bakers' dozen)
